rationale.R1.2: The section contains an internal inconsistency in the SA definition: the prose definition includes both (a) correct answers on clear prompts and (b) clarifying questions on ambiguous prompts, but the operational formula given later counts only correct answers on clear prompts divided by 800 — omitting the ambiguous-subset component entirely. Logical consistency review is load-bearing if the task is technical critique.
rationale.R1.3: Several quantitative claims (SA scores, ranking, gap consistency across orderings, the '>60%' threshold inference) are tied to Table 1 and must be checked for alignment with reported figures. Evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing if the task is technical review.
rationale.R1.6: Prose quality issues are plausible targets of 'help me with this section' — sentence-level polish, paragraph transitions, and tightening the conclusion are all in scope if the task is writing improvement.

parsed.clarification_question: Is your primary goal (a) improving prose and writing quality, or (b) identifying logical, technical, or evidential problems in the content (e.g., metric definition inconsistency, claim strength)?
